message:
audit: batch 388 — deep circuit_breaker.rs audit (1950L SOUND)

Deep audit of combinator/circuit_breaker.rs:
- Atomic u64 state machine bit packing: correct, no field overlap
- HalfOpen probe logic: epoch-based stale prevention, correct slot accounting
- Sliding window: cleanup/eviction correct, unbounded in entry count (bounded by call_rate × window_duration)
- CAS ordering: consistent Release/Acquire pairs across all transitions
- Metrics consistency: best-effort atomics for observational use, correct
- Cooldown/recovery: saturating_sub timing, cannot be bypassed except by explicit reset()

0 bugs found.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
